title: Hooked
description: Grappling hooks made simple, natural, and useful
body:
![Hooked mod banner image.](https://imgur.com/GkiO6FX.png)

**Hooked is a mod designed to provide an effective replacement for creative flight.** To achieve this, Hooked provides 
grappling hooks which are faster, easier to use, and more fun than jetpacks or creative flight. 

### Simple
* Hooks have no firing arc, meaning you don't have to line up every shot
* Hooks pull you toward them with a constant force, no swinging to deal with
* Hooked doesn't require holding an item, instead it's a trinket/curio bound to a key for immediate access

### Natural
* Simple controls mean hooks quickly become a natural extension of your moveset, as instinctive as the sneak key
* The lack of a firing arc means you don't have to line up every shot, making it all the more automatic

### Useful
* Hooked provides options for everything from your first night in a world to frolicking in the nether without thought of the terrors it contains
* The controls are designed to reduce the mental barrier to use hooks, allowing them to be used whenever and wherever it might be helpful
* Hooks have no durability, so you can use them without feeling like every usage may be a waste
* While using a hook your mining speed is completely unimpaired, whether in the air or underwater
* Hooks are simulated almost entirely client-side, much like normal movement, meaning a laggy connection shouldn't cause too much trouble
* Creative flight is *the* answer for builders, so Hooked provides bounded creative flight using the Redstone Hook

## Hook variants:
* **Wood hook** - not great, but better than nothing in the super early game
* **Iron hook** - pretty good and not too expensive with a cost totaling ten iron and two sticks
* **Diamond hook** - the best general-purpose hook in the mod, offering multiple hooks at a great middle of the road speed
* **Ender hook** - one of the two diamond hook sidegrades, it's very, *very* fast (perfect for clutches in the nether or with an Elytra)
* **Redstone hook** - the second diamond hook sidegrade, it offers full creative flight within the region bounded by the hooks

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/TkvvhtgAm_A" title="Hooked 2.0" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Datapack support

Hooked has datapack support for custom hook types, including all attributes, custom textures, and even custom hook models!
Full datapack docs can be found [in the README](https://github.com/thecodewarrior/Hooked?tab=readme-ov-file#datapacks)

---

Yes these hooks are heavily inspired by Terraria's, in fact I first attempted this mod long ago as Terraria Hooks:
([original Reddit post](https://www.reddit.com/r/feedthebeast/comments/3p32ho/does_anyone_like_the_hooks_from_terraria/) 
| [original code on GitHub](https://github.com/thecodewarrior/Hooked/tree/1.7.10-first-try))
